expectations.text: Correctly identifies this as a pyannote gated model access issue
expectations.evidence: "The 403 is coming from pyannote diarization, not from Whisper transcription"

expectations.text: Mentions the HF_TOKEN environment variable requirement
expectations.evidence: Multiple references to HF_TOKEN, verification snippet checking os.environ['HF_TOKEN']

expectations.text: Directs user to accept the model license at the HuggingFace model page
expectations.evidence: Links to both pyannote/speaker-diarization-3.1 and pyannote/segmentation-3.0 pages

expectations.text: Explains why hot pass works (uses whisper, no pyannote) while cold pass fails
expectations.evidence: Clear section explaining hot pass uses mlx_whisper only, cold pass adds diarize call

expectations.text: Mentions that cold pass can still work without diarization (graceful fallback)
expectations.evidence: "the cold pass already handles this gracefully" + skip_diarize=True option
